---
title: "Geomorphology"
subtitle: "Study of landforms, their processes, and the forces that shape Earth's surface."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include geomorphology/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Geomorphology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include geomorphology/00b-solar-system-earth.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/00c-origin-age-earth.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/00d-geological-time-scale.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/01-fundamental-concepts-of-geomorphology.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/02-factors-controlling-landform-development.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/03-endogenetic-and-exogenetic-forces.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/04-denudation-processes.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/05-continental-drift-and-plate-tectonics.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/19-rocks.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/06-geomorphic-cycle.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/09-slope-forms-and-processes.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/07-landforms-fluvial.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/08-landforms-glacial.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/10-coastal-landforms.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/11-karst-landforms.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/12-aeolian-landforms.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/18-plateaus-and-plains.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include geomorphology/13-applied-geomorphology.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/14-environmental-geomorphology.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/15-drainage-basin-morphometry.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/16-modern-techniques-in-geomorphology.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include geomorphology/17-geosynclines-and-mountain-building.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include geomorphology/20-quick-reference.md >}}

{{< include geomorphology/21-key-scholars-geomorphology.md >}}

---
